Classic Banana Bread: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan. Mash 3 very ripe bananas in a large bowl; stir in 1/3 cup melted butter, 3/4 cup sugar, one beaten egg, and 1 teaspoon vanilla. Sprinkle in 1 teaspoon baking soda and a pinch of salt, then gently fold in 1 1/2 cups all-purpose flour until just combined; optional add-ins include 1/2 cup chopped walnuts or chocolate chips. Pour into the prepared pan and bake 55–65 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a rack.
